sizing_rule.note: Scale position size to account equity (1 contract per $20,000) with max 50% drawdown tolerance. Recalculate whenever equity changes by $5,000. Derived base_risk_pct of 5% from 1 contract per $20k equity ratio with typical 1% risk per trade.

source_rule_text: A trader should scale position size proportionally to account equity and risk tolerance to ensure drawdowns remain within acceptable limits and avoid catastrophic losses.
